message:
🐛 Restore overscroll-contain on stack selector scroll list (#787)

Re-adds overscroll-contain to prevent scroll chaining from the dropdown
to the dashboard when reaching the top/bottom of the stack list.
This was accidentally removed in the previous scroll fix.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
